scripts.postinstall: bash patch-cetus-deps.sh; find node_modules -path '*/node_modules/react' -type d -not -path 'node_modules/react' -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null; find node_modules -path '*/node_modules/react-dom' -type d -not -path 'node_modules/react-dom' -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null; rm -rf node_modules/@7kprotocol/sdk-ts/node_modules/uuid node_modules/@bluefin-exchange/bluefin7k-aggregator-sdk/node_modules/uuid 2>/dev/null || true
